name: plain_enable_thinking_false
content:
*   When processing documents exceeding 32,768 tokens, such as lengthy legal contracts, technical manuals, or full-length books, to maintain coherence across the entire text.
*   When performing complex cross-document analysis or summarization tasks that require synthesizing information from multiple large sources simultaneously.
*   When engaging in extended multi-turn conversations where retaining context from earlier parts of the dialogue is critical for accurate and consistent responses.

name: json_enable_thinking_false
